title: State of HubSpot: How the Best Do It Different
abstract:
We’re witnessing a seismic shift in the way top companies use HubSpot. Whether it’s leveraging AI, deepening customer connections, or moving from ‘selling’ to ‘helping people buy’, these high performers clearly see the opportunity in 2026 — and they’re taking concrete steps to capitalize. 

Join this expert panel to learn what separates these top-performing companies, and see how they’re preparing their organizations to win in an age where AI and shifting buyer expectations are everything.

title: Supercharge Demand Gen With Quality Leads on TikTok
abstract: AI-powered automation is a performance edge on TikTok and supercharges leads with features that drive awareness through conversion. Join a discussion around how to drive quality leads at scale, while keeping pace with your customers and the communities they interact with.

title: The AI Ops Toolkit: Agentic Workflows for Speed and Growth
abstract: AI has already had a visible impact on Sales, CS, and Marketing. But much of the behind-the-scenes work that makes a business run is still shockingly manual and time-draining—from hiring, to project management, to hunting down the right data at the right time.  This session is a showcase of one company’s attempts to “automate (nearly) everything”, highlighting where we’ve found surprising challenges and easy wins.  The goal is to offer a small plug-and-play AI toolkit for every attendee to begin automating their own team’s processes, and do more with less.

title: The Creative Process — Iterating Towards GTM Alpha
abstract: GTM alpha might be a new term, but the concept is as old as cold outbound itself. Doing what everyone else is doing doesn't give you an edge. What gives you an edge is unique data with unique insights that craft unique GTM plays that stand out from your competition. In this highly tactical workshop, we'll start at the 30,000-foot view, leverage the latest AI tools to help you generate ideas for your own GTM alpha, and then translate your ideas into tangible workflows you can start executing today. Bring your laptops—we'll be digging in deep.

title: The Future of AI: When Will We See an Intelligence Explosion
abstract: Drawing from extensive conversations with AI's leading minds, Dwarkesh Patel offers his unique perspective on transformative technologies reshaping our future. This session explores AI progress over the next few years: from LLMs demonstrating increasingly complex reasoning to intelligent agents automating entire workflows. Patel shares insights from interviews with top researchers and entrepreneurs about the race toward AGI and when he expects explosive economic growth. He'll offer thoughts on preparing yourself and your business for massive changes ahead.

title: The Future of Marketing Campaigns
abstract:
Discover how to revolutionize campaign creation for the AI era. 

Experience an infinite canvas where your team can collaborate with AI to easily create and measure marketing campaigns. Learn how this powerful new feature saves time and drives superior results for your marketing efforts.

title: The Impact of Making People Uncomfortable
abstract: Discover how uncomfortable conversations can spark extraordinary change, and why creating truly accessible and inclusive environments doesn't just help people thrive - it drives real business results. Learn strategies to build spaces where everyone succeeds, turning accessibility from obligation into a competitive advantage.

title: The Next Big AIdea
abstract: Watch AI startup founders compete for $50K in the first-ever AI pitch competition presented by HubSpot for Startups and HubSpot Media. Five finalists will present their innovative solutions live, judged by HubSpot Media creators and industry experts. Perfect for entrepreneurs, investors, and AI enthusiasts looking to discover cutting-edge startups and learn what makes a winning pitch.

title: The Sustainable Scale: Growth Lessons From Dominique Crenn
abstract: Three-Michelin-star chef Dominique Crenn reveals her framework for scaling excellence without sacrificing quality or sustainability. Learn how she maintains consistency across her restaurant group while preserving core values during growth. Discover practical approaches to establishing quality standards that scale, fostering sustainable innovation, and leading with purpose in a high-pressure industry. Perfect for growth-focused leaders building customer-obsessed organizations where excellence and responsibility coexist at every level.

title: Tools for Growth: Add Push and SMS to HubSpot With OneSignal
abstract: Are you getting ghosted on email? Modern engagement isn’t built on email alone. In a mobile-obsessed world, you need to connect with customers across all channels. Learn how AI is reshaping messaging & how OneSignal – the only HubSpot Marketplace app with true omnichannel capabilities – powers SMS, Mobile Push, In-App Messaging, Web Push, & Email all within the Marketing Hub.

title: Tools for Growth: Let AI Agents Run Your Event Outreach
abstract: Events are back—but many teams still miss pre- and post-event opportunities. In this tactical session, learn how Qualified’s AI SDR, Piper, drives personalized outreach and follow-up at scale—without overwhelming your reps. See how top teams use AI to ID high-fit attendees, book meetings in advance, and re-engage leads while momentum’s hot. If you're still relying on manual follow-up or stretched SDRs, this is your blueprint for turning every event into a pipeline machine.

title: Tools for Growth: Ramp up Revenue With Vidyard’s Video Agent
abstract: Learn how Vidyard’s Video Agent integrates with HubSpot to automate personalized video outreach triggered by custom actions. We’ll explore use cases for marketers, sales reps, and post-sale teams to reclaim time, boost engagement, and drive revenue through agentic video experiences.

title: Tools for Growth: Supercharge HubSpot Email With ZeroBounce
abstract: Poor email data costs marketers opportunities and results. In this session, ZeroBounce reveals how email validation prevents bounce rates, boosts deliverability, and enhances every HubSpot campaign. You’ll see a live demo of ZeroBounce’s HubSpot CRM and Forms integrations, plus a first look at ZeroBounce One—a powerful suite for complete email deliverability.

title: Tools for Growth: Turning Conversations Into Conversions
abstract: The new suite of AI Meeting Agents from Otter.ai does so much more than just take notes. With live-transcription, automated summaries, AI chat, and other powerful tools, they help teams get more out of every meeting. And with the AI Sales Agent coaching reps in real-time or the SDR Agent handling product demos and sales calls, your team can focus on what matters most.

title: Tools for Growth: Unify Data, Speed Up Funnel With AI Agents
abstract: B2B SaaS GTM teams struggle with slow funnels, scattered data, and missed signals. In this live demo, see how AI agents unify your martech stack, enrich buyer context in real-time, and trigger precise omnichannel actions. Walk away with strategies to accelerate Lead-to-SQL conversions and speed up your funnel.

title: Transforming Buyer Intent Signals Into Revenue With HubSpot
abstract: In today’s market, it often feels like Marketing and Sales cast a wide net for leads that don’t lead anywhere. Leveraging the power of HubSpot Buyer Intent, there is a better way - A way to cast your net where you know buyers are ready to engage. During this session, we’ll spotlight the real impact of HubSpot Buyer Intent in Marketing and Sales through the following sub-topics: - How Buyer Intent can drive hyper-personalization in marketing outreach - The role of Buyer Intent in lead scoring & sales qualification - The value of Buyer Intent revealing new business opportunities in your funnel.

title: Using Brain Science To Explain Irrational Behavior
abstract:
Understanding why they don’t understand you.

Economists tell us that given the opportunity, people will behave rationally. If you’re anything like me, you have countless examples DAILY of people behaving irrationally! What would the world look like if we could cure the stupidity around us? Imagine freedom from frustration. Imagine the peace. This session, based on Eric M. Bailey’s bestselling book, can fix that. This session can change your life.

title: Video Marketing Trends From 90M Videos and 100K Brands
abstract: Wistia analyzed 90M+ videos and 100K+ brands to reveal what's working in video marketing today. Sam Balter and Taylor Corrado will share insights on AI's impact, budget shifts, optimal video length/placement, and interactive elements that convert viewers to customers.

title: What Comes After Content Marketing
abstract: Content was King, then A.I. became God. Where does the human element fit in between? Google and OpenAI are shaking up the marketing landscape, and we need to become culture builders, not just content creators. When it comes to seeking, understanding, and engaging with communities, there are few tools as effective as Reddit. Hear from two of the architects of modern-day Reddit on how and why community marketing and culture building matters more than ever for your business strategy today.

title: What's New for Marketers With HubSpot
abstract: Marketing is evolving fast, but we’re here to help you stay ahead. Join us to learn how HubSpot’s newest AI-powered marketing tools help you find and engage the right audience and create high-performing content that converts, all while scaling your team’s efficiency.

title: Work Is Broken…Play Can Fix It!
abstract: Why does work feel worse now than ever? 85% of workers are disengaged, 81% are job-hunting, 72% feel underpaid, and nearly 80% struggle with work-life balance. These are more than just numbers—they’re the sign of a workforce barely hanging on. Businesses are losing almost $500 billion, with absenteeism, turnover, and accidents spiking.   Steven Johnson put it best: “You’ll find the future where people are having fun.” This talk is a call to action for leaders who want to embrace a play-oriented mindset—creating a work environment that celebrates risk, failure, and joyful experiments.

title: Zero-Click SEO Conversion Strategies: AI and Google Search
abstract: AI Overviews and ChatGPT now answer questions directly, disrupting traditional SEO strategies. But this shift creates new opportunities for smart marketers to generate customers from organic and prove the value of their marketing efforts despite zero-click trends. Join AI and SEO expert Dale Bertrand for an actionable session packed with proven methods to adapt your content strategy for AI and zero-click search. Discover how to create interactive tools, original research, and data-driven content that AI can’t summarize and convert searchers into customers even when they don’t click.

title: Zero-to-Pipeline: Crafting a Data-Driven Growth Machine
abstract: Learn how to build and scale a high-performing growth engine from the ground up. This session will equip you with actionable strategies to kickstart your demand generation motion without historical data to lean on. We’ll dive into: how to leverage tools and data sources to identify market opportunities when starting from zero; proven tactics for rapid experimentation across channels; strategies for scaling what works while maintaining agility. Perfect for growth marketers, demand gen leaders, and startup founders looking to build a data-driven foundation for sustainable pipeline generation.

title: $0.25 AI SEO: Rank Everywhere for the Price of a Stamp
abstract: In this session, you'll learn how the search landscape has completely changed and how you can get ahead of the competition by leveraging a new SEO strategy along with exclusive prompts. You'll learn how to wield the power of Cursor, Claude Code, and MCPs to clone yourself 100 times, and much more.

title: 40-Min AI Sprint: Branded AI Training and Take-Home Playbook
abstract: If AI isn’t driving results, we’ll fix it in 40 minutes. Get hands-on with the 5F Framework to train AI on your brand for 2-3X better results. This session distills the best of HubSpot’s AI Accelerator HUG into an actionable workshop—plus, you’ll take home an AI playbook to see results by Monday. Why this matters: AI is only as good as the context you give it. To drive real impact, it must speak your brand’s language, understand your ICP, and generate insights that move the needle. After this session, you’ll turn AI into a true extension of your team—without wasting hours on trial and error.

title: 8ish GTM AI Agent Hacks My 8yo Kid Accidentally Figured Out
abstract: Kids instinctively find the smartest, easiest way to win. What if AI Agents could give your GTM team the same edge? In this session, you’ll learn 8ish practical AI Agent use cases that will make your GTM strategy smarter, faster, more intuitive, and more effective. You’ll also learn how to cut through the fuzziness of how AI Agents actually work—so you can move beyond hype to real implementation. While others spend time debating AI, you’ll leave with real-world applications that give you a competitive advantage. The question is: will you be the first to implement them?

title: AI Broke Your Marketing - Here's What You Do Now
abstract: Kipp and Aja reveal the four-stage playbook that will empower marketers to thrive while their competitors struggle in the AI era. You'll walk away with the exact tactics, tools, and strategies to implement immediately.

title: Best Practices Are Garbage: In Marketing and Life
abstract: You’ve been lied to. Best practices aren’t just outdated—they’re actively holding you back. They tell you what not to do, making you believe you can’t or shouldn’t try certain things. So, you don’t. And that’s exactly why you’re missing out. This session is a wake-up call. We’re flipping the script on marketing and life, exposing why the opposite of many so-called best practices is actually best. Expect instant, high-impact marketing tactics you should’ve been using yesterday—plus a mindset shift that will change how you approach your career, business growth, and everyday life.

title: Beyond the Booth: B2B Sales Strategies for Field Events
abstract: B2B sales teams walk into field events with big goals—but too often, they leave revenue opportunities on the table. In fact, 80% of trade show leads go cold due to poor follow-up. The disconnect? Many teams treat events as branding exercises rather than revenue-generating opportunities.  In this session, HubSpot alumnus and B2B leader Nick Salvatoriello will share how sales teams can use content marketing to draw in and invite quality prospects they’re working with to the event, and how to leverage HubSpot automation and sequences to enable contacts after the event.

title: Build Your First AI Agent in Breeze Studio
abstract: Meet your next digital teammate. In this demo, you’ll learn how to build and customize AI Agents in Breeze Studio—helping sales, marketing, content, service, and operations teams save time and work smarter. See how easy it is to configure prompts, add or remove tools, give your agent context, and automate tasks with triggers. We’ll walk through setting up the Customer Handoff Agent, and you'll leave knowing how to make agents that feel like part of your team.

title: Build Your First AI Assistant in Breeze Studio
abstract: Learn how to create custom assistants that enable and empower your team in less than 5 minutes. With Breeze Studio, you can shape your assistant by customizing the prompt, adding knowledge sources, and designing it to work right inside the Breeze Assistant side panel—ready to assist your team wherever they are in HubSpot.

title: Building the GTM Motion of 2026 With Clay and AI Agents
abstract: Marketing and Sales still operate in silos. SDRs send generic cold outreach. Content and inbound leads go unused. In this session, SalesCaptain CEO Bill Stathopoulos - author of Cold Email Secrets - shares how 60+ companies, including Nestlé, Drip, Robin AI, and GlossGenius, are rethinking GTM. Learn why Outbound is now Inbound and how Clay, AI agents, and intent data help unify teams and turn hidden signals into pipeline.

title: Center Stage: Women Changing the Game in Sports Marketing
abstract: What happens when women lead? Entire industries evolve. From the locker room to the newsroom to the boardroom, this panel features powerhouse women rewriting the playbook in sports, media, and brand leadership. Karina Martinez and Jennifer Yepez-Blundell from DRAFTED sit down with moderator Sonia Thompson to share how they’ve built people-first strategies that shift culture and scale impact.

title: Centering Culture in the Future of AI
abstract: In this interactive session, Erin Reddick—founder of ChatBlackGPT—shares the real-world story behind a culturally aware AI built with intention and care. Through narrative-driven examples and live audience engagement, Erin explores the consequences when AI is deployed without regard for community context, and how thoughtful design can address that.

title: CoLab 11: The Scale Delusion: Is Personal Touch Dead?
abstract: For years, Customer Success, Community, and Customer Support relied on personal touch. But with budgets decreasing and expectations increasing, scale is the word on everyone's lips. How do connection-focused industries thrive in a world focused on digitalization? Join fellow leaders for deep discussion on where customer-focused roles are heading in the age of AI. From existential to tactical, we'll explore shifting trends and leave you with tactics, philosophies, and a reminder that you're not alone. This session is a repeat offering of CoLab 1 (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

title: CoLab 12: Redefining Your Role in the Age of AI
abstract: Your current job is disappearing. Sorry, but it's true. AI is changing how we work forever. This workshop helps Sales/Marketing/Service pros stop panicking and start pivoting—learn what makes you irreplaceable and learn how to design your new role. This session is a repeat offering of CoLab 3 (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

title: CoLab 13: Max Your ELUs: Events That Lead With Energy
abstract: For experienced event leaders ready to rethink ROI. Event success isn't measured in headcount—it's measured in ELUs (Energy Leadership Units). Join event marketing expert Dahlia El Gazzar exploring how to create events where Eyes Light Up. Through peer dialogue and energy mapping, discover where your events create energy spikes vs. leaks. Collaborate with senior event professionals to build tactical energy boosters you can implement immediately. This session is a repeat offering of CoLab 4 (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

title: CoLab 14: Stop Fighting Resistance—Start Using It
abstract: You're not lazy. You're adaptively reluctant, and that's your superpower. This group experience flips productivity advice by revealing why resistance to tasks is an evolutionary feature. Learn the FORCE framework that works WITH your reluctance, not against it, and why the AI age demands weaponizing your resistance. Ideal for leaders looking to unlock productivity for themselves and their teams. This session is a repeat offering of CoLab 2 (not a series); each occurrence covers the same material.

title: Conversational Enrichment: The Self Generating CRM
abstract: Discover how Conversational Enrichment uses AI to understand every customer email, call, and document, auto-capturing contacts, intent, and key facts while you work. Leave manual data entry behind and arm sales, support, and RevOps teams with accurate coverage and instant next-step insights.

title: Creator CEO Playbook: Solopreneur to Media Corp in 2025
abstract: Master the 2025 Creator CEO transition from content producer to media empire builder. Learn revenue diversification beyond sponsorships, audience-centric ecosystems reducing platform dependency, and scalable systems preserving wellbeing while maximizing output and ROI.

title: Curiosity at Work
abstract: With the advance of AI and tools like Perplexity, question-first problem-solving has transformed decision-making across every industry. Join Aravind Srinivas, CEO and Co-founder of Perplexity, as he reveals how curiosity-driven AI is putting more joy into work while dramatically accelerating both productivity and impact through real-world examples.

title: Customer Value Revolution: 5 Shifts for CS Breakthrough
abstract: Customer Success has been playing defense for too long. Despite having talented people who genuinely want to help, CS teams have been buried in admin work, chasing the wrong metrics, and lacking the tools to prove their impact. That's finally changing. Join HubSpot's chief customer success officer as he reveals why this is CS's breakthrough moment. Learn the Customer Value Revolution framework — five shifts that let you measure real outcomes (not just usage), leverage AI to scale personalized value, and finally align CS with product. See how HubSpot transformed retention into growth.

title: DEBATE: Why Founder-Led Brands Falter
abstract: "Founder-led marketing" is trending among marketers, but is it the secret to thriving, or a slippery slope, filled with pitfalls? Join this debate to see whether founder-led brands equal funding or faltering!

title: Deep Selling - A New Sales Mindset, Skill-Set and Tool-Set
abstract: To drive sustainable business growth in the Age of AI, business leaders and teams need to urgently transform all aspects of sales execution: mindset, skill-set & tool-set.  This session will teach attendees how to: Build DEEPER buyer relationships that create sustainable value. Audit their current sales execution model against best practice. Stop being a ’mile-wide and an inch-deep’ in your accounts. Transform to Digital-First & Data-Led (DEEP) Selling. Use data to drive a ’ signals-based’ sales & marketing model: mindset, skill-set & tool-set. Thrive in 2025 (& beyond).

title: Disruptors: AI-Enhanced Creator Transform Sales
abstract: Morgan J. Ingram reveals how creator partnerships transform entire industries. Learn frameworks for authentic creator relationships, value-aligned growth strategies, and multi-dimensional ROI measurement from leaders who built creator-powered empires and movements.

title: Drive CRM Adoption With Gamification and Behavioral Science
abstract: Discover how gamification and behavioral science principles can unlock CRM adoption within HubSpot. Learn from real customer stories and get practical examples. Ideal for RevOps, CRM managers, and customer success leaders.

title: ENCORE: ABM for the Modern Marketer: Strategies That Actually Work
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! ABM isn’t what it used to be—and that’s a good thing. In this hands-on workshop, we’ll break down what modern, high-performing ABM really looks like in 2025. You’ll learn how to move beyond generic account lists and anonymous intent to build personalized, signal-rich campaigns that target the right people and drive real pipeline. From generating your own first-party signals to building contact-level attribution models, this session gives marketing the frameworks, workflows, and GTM alignment needed to make ABM perform— compliantly, predictable, and powerfully.

title: ENCORE: Everboarding: The Modern Approach to Onboarding
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Stop thinking of onboarding as a one-time event and start thinking about it as a continuous journey. We’ll explore how to create a dynamic, ongoing learning experience that empowers your customers to fully utilize your product or service to achieve their desired outcomes.  We will challenge traditional onboarding approaches and introduce strategies for building lasting relationships and driving customer lifetime value.  We’ll cover key elements of everboarding, including tailored content delivery, ongoing support resources, and regular check-ins.

title: ENCORE: GTM Growth Decoded With Sangram Vajre
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! This hands-on session goes beyond inspiration — it’s about transformation. Over 90 minutes, we’ll walk through how to design and evaluate your company’s GTM Operating System using the problem-product-platform framework used by 100+ companies across SaaS, tech, and B2B markets.

title: ENCORE: Lab: AI-Powered Sales Success With Sales Workspace
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Learn how the sales workspace helps your reps embrace a centralized solution and close deals faster. In this hands-on lab, you'll learn about the sales workspace and the integrated AI that makes it easy to succeed using Sales Hub. You’ll leave with a gameplan on how to support the team in the sales workspace so that you can build pipeline and close more deals.

title: ENCORE: Lab: From Data Chaos to Clarity With HubSpot Smart CRM
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Fragmented customer data holds your business back — marketing can’t segment, sales misses signals, and service lacks context. In this hands-on workshop, learn how to turn HubSpot Smart CRM into a unified data powerhouse. We’ll walk through step-by-step tactics to build a strategic data framework, maintain data quality, and unlock insights your teams can use. You’ll leave with a starter guide and a clear roadmap to make HubSpot Smart CRM your single source of truth.

title: ENCORE: Lab: HubSpot Email Marketing Toolkit for the AI Era
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Discover how to leverage HubSpot's comprehensive email marketing tools to create campaigns that truly connect with your audience. In this interactive Lab, you'll learn how AI can help craft compelling copy, practical ways to improve deliverability, and smart approaches to measuring what works. You'll leave with actionable strategies to immediately enhance your email performance and measure its impact on your marketing goals.

title: ENCORE: Lab: HubSpot Workflow Automation With AI
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! In this lab, you'll learn how to develop intelligent workflows to automate customer engagement based on behavioral triggers. This lab is ideal for those seeking to streamline marketing, sales, and service processes through AI-enhanced automation. You'll discover how customer actions can initiate personalized and efficient automated responses, resulting in improved customer experiences and greater productivity.

title: ENCORE: LinkedIn Ads Deep Dive: Get Discounts on Traffic
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity!  The B2B targeting of LinkedIn Ads is incredible, but advertisers are paying more than they need to, reducing the results they can get for their budget.  Join AJ Wilcox, the host of the LinkedIn Ads Show, as he walks you through the 5 changes that you can make to your LinkedIn Ads campaigns to cut costs in half, right now, and double your pipeline.

title: ENCORE: Revenue Modeling 101: Plan, Predict and Scale for 2026
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! You'll build a revenue model that actually works—one that aligns marketing and sales with company goals so you can plan your next moves with confidence. You’ll walk away with a revenue model template you can use immediately, whether you’re refining your go-to-market strategy or just trying to make sense of the numbers. No fluff, no guesswork—just a proven framework to help you hit (and exceed) your revenue goals.

title: ENCORE: The Leadership Gap Is Costing You—Here’s How to Fix It
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! The leadership gap is a business risk that directly impacts growth, innovation, and revenue. Companies with diverse leadership teams are 70% more likely to capture new markets and 35% more likely to outperform competitors. Yet, many organizations unknowingly stall their own progress by failing to fix the “broken rung” in leadership pipelines. This session breaks down the impact of homogenous leadership and provides a data-driven, actionable roadmap to build stronger, more inclusive teams that drive long-term success.

title: ENCORE: The Secret to SuperHuman-Centric Marketing That Converts
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Most marketing today? Robotic, disconnected, forgettable. You’re checking all the boxes—SEO, content, metrics—but where are the conversions, loyalty, and real human connection?  Here’s the truth: Humans don’t buy from brands. They buy from other Humans. Without authenticity, empathy, and purpose, you’re leaving relationships and revenue on the table. In this no-BS, high-energy session, I’m unveiling the SuperHuman Marketing Framework—a blueprint for marketing that feels good, builds trust, and converts like crazy.

title: ENCORE: Tools for Growth: Ramp up Revenue With Vidyard’s Video Agent
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Learn how Vidyard’s Video Agent integrates with HubSpot to automate personalized video outreach triggered by custom actions. We’ll explore use cases for marketers, sales reps, and post-sale teams to reclaim time, boost engagement, and drive revenue through agentic video experiences.

title: ENCORE: Using Brain Science To Explain Irrational Behavior
abstract:
ENCORE due to popularity! Understanding why they don’t understand you.
Economists tell us that given the opportunity, people will behave rationally. If you’re anything like me, you have countless examples DAILY of people behaving irrationally! What would the world look like if we could cure the stupidity around us? Imagine freedom from frustration. Imagine the peace. This session, based on Eric M. Bailey’s bestselling book, can fix that. This session can change your life.

title: ENCORE: What Comes After Content Marketing
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Content was King, then A.I. became God. Where does the human element fit in between? Google and OpenAI are shaking up the marketing landscape, and we need to become culture builders, not just content creators. When it comes to seeking, understanding, and engaging with communities, there are few tools as effective as Reddit. Hear from two of the architects of modern-day Reddit on how and why community marketing and culture building matters more than ever for your business strategy today.

title: ENCORE: What's New for Service With HubSpot
abstract: ENCORE due to popularity! Service teams today need to handle more than ever, and still find time to build relationships that drive long-term loyalty. Join us to learn how HubSpot’s latest service tools can help your team scale support, discover key trends, and deliver customer experiences that drive retention.

title: Endless Customers: How to Build a Brand that’s Built to Last
abstract: The world of sales and marketing is getting harder. Buyers are less trusting. There’s more noise than ever, it’s getting harder and harder to stand out. To top it all off, AI and ”zero click” mean attracting website visitors is harder than it has ever been.  What’s the solution?  You must build a known and trusted brand.  And you can’t play by the same rules everyone else in your industry is playing. In this session, popular INBOUND speaker Marcus Sheridan will rock the house by showing a clear system for disrupting your industry, standing out, and forming a known and trusted brand today.

title: Fix Bad Data Fast: A New HubSpot Data Quality Experience
abstract: Data powers every great customer experience—but messy data holds teams back. In this 15-minute spotlight, discover HubSpot’s new Data Quality Experience: a centralized hub that makes it easy to spot issues, fix them fast, and enrich records at scale. From quick wins to advanced automation, learn how HubSpot helps you maintain data health so you can focus on growing your business.

title: From Beta to Breakthrough: Making Early Adoption Your DNA
abstract: The AI era demands new rules: ship fast, learn faster, never stop experimenting. Motorola Solutions, SANDOW and Youth on Course mastered this by making “always-beta” their DNA. Learn how they built cultures that match AI's pace through fearless experimentation, rapid implementation, and treating every launch as a starting line—not a finish line.

title: How To Use ABM To Generate Contact-Level Intent
abstract: Most ABM programs stop at account targeting—but pipeline is built by people. In this session, you’ll learn how to take a contact-first approach to ABM that helps you identify and generate intent at the individual level. We’ll cover how to build campaigns that surface real buying signals, connect those signals to pipeline outcomes, and empower your sales team to take action faster. If you’re tired of chasing anonymous intent data, this session will show you how to create your own—through smart targeting, real engagement, and better GTM alignment—and turn that intent into revenue.

title: How the HubSpot Blog Is Adapting to the Shifts in Search
abstract: Search is changing—and so is our approach to blogging at HubSpot. In this session, we’ll share how we're responding to shrinking click-through rates and the rise of AI. You’ll hear what we’re doing differently, what’s working (and what’s not), and how we’re redefining success in an unpredictable SEO landscape. If you're rethinking your content playbook and want a peek behind the curtain, this one’s for you.

title: How to Write Better Messaging for Your AI Product
abstract: Right now, every software company is trying to market their AI as something innovative and different. But most companies are putting out messaging that either sounds like everyone else, or confuses buyers who are wary of all the AI-hype. This talk will give you a practical framework for how to write messaging that highlights the unique value of your AI product. You’ll  learn how to: hit the right altitude of messaging based on your buyer’s understanding of AI; use concrete language to help people quickly grasp why your AI matters; and differentiate your product in a rapidly evolving space.

title: HubSpot Hot Ones
abstract: HubSpot Co-founder Brian Halligan joins Sean Evans on stage to take on the hot wing gauntlet. Join for some spicy wings and hot takes!

title: HubSpot Sales, Unfiltered: Real Lessons From SMB Growth Machine
abstract: Pull back the curtain on how HubSpot’s Small Business sales org 3x’d in 3 years—navigating change, scaling culture, and leaning into AI. Hear real stories from four senior directors who’ve spent a combined 50 years growing HubSpot’s largest sales segment.

title: Inside the AI Ecosystem: How Platforms Win Together
abstract: AI is reshaping how businesses operate, with evolving models that are getting smarter every day. In this conversation, HubSpot's EVP of Product, Karen Ng, and OpenAI's Head of Product, Platform, Olivier Godement, explore how platforms and AI companies are partnering to build this future layer by layer. They'll share what's driving model evolution and how businesses of all sizes can harness these shifts. This is the real work: building tomorrow's business stack, together.

title: Meetup: AI Fails and Lessons You Won't Hear Elsewhere
abstract:
Welcome to Failure Fridays—an interactive session for those experimenting with AI, tackling the hard stuff, and learning on the go. We're creating a judgment-free zone where hard lessons get the spotlight and failures become learning gold.
We’ll start with a roundtable—want to share? DM the host on LinkedIn—then move into small-group circles for honest conversation and shared learning, and end with an open mic of real takeaways. Come for the failures. Stay for the community. Leave with fresh perspective.
*Session reservations required this year.

title: Meetup: Sales Pros Growing With Skill and Community
abstract:
The new sales environment requires competence, community building and collaboration. This interactive session will include framing the topic, a quick panel, and an interactive activity which will give participants new found insights, ideas, and connections resulting in energizing their growth strategies. 

*Session reservations required this year.

title: Meetup: Sales and Revenue Leader Roundtable
abstract:
Join sales leaders for an interactive meetup focused on sales and revenue operations. This discussion-based format brings together forward-thinking leaders to share strategies, challenges, and solutions in getting to "deal closed" faster. Network with fellow sales and revenue experts and connect with HubSpot team members in a collaborative environment.

*Session reservations required this year.

title: Meetup: The Hustle—for Founders and Future Founders
abstract:
Are you a founder? Aspiring founder? Just a really cool person obsessed with business & tech? At this meetup, all are welcome. The Hustle is the only business & tech media brand designed to help you think like a founder, no matter what stage of the journey you’re on. Come hang out with the next generation of founders (and get some free swag, too!).

*Session reservations required this year.

title: No More Pilots: The Insider Playbook for Shipping AI Agents
abstract: Most teams are trapped in endless AI pilots, while a select few have already figured out how to ship agents that work at scale. In this session, we’ll cover the hard lessons and architecture choices behind organizations that move from experimental chaos to reliable, production-ready automation.

title: Sales Data Revolution: Unlocking Revenue Intelligence
abstract: The future of sales isn't more data—it's smarter data. With B2B deals involving many stakeholders and thousands of touchpoints, the challenge is turning data into insight—fast. Learn how leading teams use AI in HubSpot’s Sales Hub to combine structured and unstructured data, uncover buyer intent, predict outcomes, and guide smarter sales. You'll discover how SANDOW Design Group accelerated their deals and transformed customer conversations into revenue intelligence that drives real results.

title: Smart Signals, Real Replies With HubSpot’s Prospecting Agent
abstract: Your prospects receive over 1,000+ cold emails yearly. Almost all go unanswered. See how HubSpot's Prospecting Agent changes the game by adapting like your best rep on their best day. Learn how it uses funding rounds, pricing page visits, form fills, and email opens to craft deeply personalized outreach that actually gets responses. You'll see the agent research companies, intelligently adapt follow-ups based on intent signals, and write in your voice - all while your team reaches new prospects and covers more territory in less time. Turn cold outreach into meetings booked today.

title: Spark Studio Session 7
abstract: Head towards the Impact Theater just passed The Spot and Fathom, and you'll find Spark Studio. Every great brand starts with a spark — and in Spark Studio, you'll bring one to life. Over 45 minutes, you and your team become a founding crew launching a brand from scratch. You'll dream big, craft winning pitches, navigate surprise challenges, and pivot under pressure before reflecting on the journey. This is a fully immersive, high-energy simulation where you won't just watch, you'll do. Expect fast-paced collaboration, creative problem-solving, and shared momentum that comes from building together under the clock. Seats limited, reserve now. What will you pitch?

title: Tech That Builds Superfans: NBA and Travel Brand Playbook
abstract: Ever wanted VIP access to see how top brands use tech to deepen customer loyalty? Hear from the San Antonio Spurs and Xanterra Travel Collection as they share how they overcame data and tech challenges to transform fan and customer engagement. Learn how they turned obstacles into opportunities—using modern platforms to convert prospects into lifelong advocates and elevate the customer experience.

title: The Art of Yes, And: Amy Poehler's Improv-Driven Success
abstract: Join comedy icon Amy Poehler as she reveals how improv's core principles have shaped her multifaceted career. From founding Paper Kite Productions to launching her podcast "Good Hang," Amy shares how saying "yes, and" has empowered her creative decisions and business ventures. Discover how comedy and collaboration helped Amy navigate uncertainty, foster innovation, and build authentic connections. Amy discusses how embracing spontaneity and presence—skills from Second City and SNL—translates into effective leadership and problem-solving.

title: The Augmented Creator: Mastering Answer Engine Optimization
abstract: Learn Answer Engine Optimization as AI transforms search. Master "centaur content strategies" blending human creativity with AI capabilities. Audit content for AI gaps, structure info for AI answers, and build workflows maximizing both human connection and AI visibility.

title: The Modern Webinar Workshop: Engage, Connect, Convert
abstract:
A webinar is no longer JUST a webinar!  

New innovations in personalization, automation, and AI have transformed how we engage, connect, and convert digital audiences. In this session, you will learn how to transform your webinar programs into highly engaging, personalized experiences that deliver actionable prospect insights, which convert to predictable pipeline and revenue. 

 This session will completely re-imagine your webinar programs.

title: Tools for Growth: 4 Ways AI and Smart Forms Drive Revenue
abstract: Discover how to transform marketing workflows from tedious manual tasks into seamless, time-saving magic. In this demo-led session, Chad Reid, VP of Marketing at Jotform, reveals four practical ways smart online forms and AI-powered features can streamline your processes and boost efficiency. See real examples—including Jotform’s integration with HubSpot and other tools—to automate data collection, reduce busywork, and unlock smarter insights that help you work smarter, not harder.

title: Tools for Growth: AI Sales Roleplays for Sales Enablement
abstract:
What if your enablement engine didn’t just train reps—but diagnosed exactly what was broken, tested interventions, proved what worked, and deployed it across your org? In this session, we’ll break down how Hyperbound helps sales teams move beyond static training to a real-time, evidence-based coaching loop.

By scoring real calls, identifying skill gaps, and assigning targeted AI roleplays, teams build a data-driven model of “what good looks like”—and continuously refine it. This is the scientific method, applied to sales performance at scale.

title: Tools for Growth: Fighting Surprise Churn With Math and AI
abstract: Discover how FunnelStory uses Gen AI, ML, process mining, and classical mathematics to predict churn and expansion 3–9 months in advance. Learn how unstructured data like conversations and notes reveal hidden risk signals and how a hyperdense intelligence graph drives powerful revenue outcomes.

title: Tools for Growth: What 8K HubSpot Customers Automate With AI
abstract: Forget AI theory. See what 8,000+ HubSpot customers actually automate with Make. This fast-paced demo reveals the results of their most impactful workflows, with a sneak preview under the hood of how they're built. A must-see for marketing and ops teams who want proven solutions that work.

title: Turn Meetings Into Momentum With AI in Sales Hub
abstract: Sales meetings should drive deals forward, not slow them down. See how HubSpot’s Sales Workspace helps reps walk into every meeting fully prepared, stay focused on the conversation (not the keyboard), and leave with clear, AI-powered next steps that keep momentum alive.

title: Unlocking ROI: Where Marketing and Finance Align
abstract: Three-quarters of marketing leaders feel increased pressure from CFOs to prove marketing's value, yet only a small percentage feel confident driving strategic decisions. Great marketing nurtures lasting, profitable relationships and integrates seamlessly with enterprise functions. Learn how integrated marketing planning eliminates operational silos, connects marketing teams with creative, leadership and finance, and transforms performance measurement to unlock ROI and increase influence.

title: What's New for Service With HubSpot
abstract: Service teams today need to handle more than ever, and still find time to build relationships that drive long-term loyalty. Join us to learn how HubSpot’s latest service tools can help your team scale support, discover key trends, and deliver customer experiences that drive retention.

title: Winning at Both Growth and Trust in the AI Age
abstract:
As your business grows, so does your data—and so do the risks and responsibilities tied to it. From scattered spreadsheets and email threads to CRM notes and support tickets, customer data often lives in unstructured and unmanaged places. Without the right strategy, businesses risk missing out on valuable insights—or worse, running into privacy and compliance pitfalls.
Join a conversation with HubSpot’s product and legal experts to learn how to transform your approach to unstructured data, data governance, privacy, and security to drive innovation and growth.
